jobs.title: Full stack (Node.js/React.js) 1W Full Time Altamira
skills: Deep, hands-on experience with Node.js in production environments
Strong knowledge of TypeScript and modern JavaScript
Experience designing and implementing RESTful APIs
Understanding of backend architecture patterns (layered architecture, modular design, separation of concerns)
Solid understanding of asynchronous programming, the event loop, and performance considerations in Node.js
Experience working with SQL databases, including query optimization, transactions, and migrations
Knowledge of authentication and authorization mechanisms (JWT, OAuth, role-based access)
Experience with error handling, logging, and monitoring in back-end services
Ability to write maintainable and testable code (unit and integration tests)
Practical experience working with PHP and Laravel in production environments
Ability to maintain and extend existing Laravel-based services
Comfort working with and debugging legacy PHP/Laravel codebases Front-end (React.js)
Strong experience building complex applications with React
Confident use of modern React patterns (hooks, context, controlled components)
Experience with state management solutions (Redux, React Query, or similar)
Ability to design and implement scalable component architectures
Strong understanding of front-end performance optimization (memoization, rendering control, code splitting)
Experience working with forms, validation, and complex UI state
Knowledge of accessibility (a11y) and cross-browser compatibility
Experience integrating front-end applications with APIs and handling asynchronous data flows
Ability to maintain consistent UI/UX in large codebases
Develop and maintain back-end services using Node.js and TypeScript
Design, implement, and evolve RESTful APIs
Maintain and extend existing PHP and Laravel services
Build and maintain complex front-end applications using React
jobs.description: Post a Job Home Jobs Companies Pricing Post a Job Full stack (Node.js/React.js) at Altamira Full Time Apply Now Altamira is a software development outsourcing company. We provide solutions that make a tangible impact on our client’s growth and productivity. With domain knowledge across product and technology development, we aim to provide cost-efficient solutions without compromising quality. We are driven to deliver the best, every single time. Altamira service delivery teams currently span Slovakia, Ukraine, and the Middle East, and we have ambitions to expand our footprint to meet the growing demand across Europe and into our primary growth markets in the UK and the US. In terms of industry verticals, we are focused on EdTech, Fintech, eCommerce, and Pharma. We are looking for a Full-Stack Developer (Node.js + React) to join our team and work on a long-term project for an international client. This is an outstaffing engagement, meaning you will be fully integrated into the client’s team and collaborate closely with their engineers, product managers, and stakeholders. Project You will join an existing product with an established codebase and an active development roadmap. The project focuses on building and maintaining scalable back-end services and complex front-end applications. You will work with modern JavaScript and TypeScript technologies while also maintaining and extending parts of a legacy system. The role requires a high level of autonomy, ownership, and the ability to work effectively in a distributed team. Requirements Back-end (Node.js, with PHP/Laravel exposure) Deep, hands-on experience with Node.js in production environments Strong knowledge of TypeScript and modern JavaScript Experience designing and implementing RESTful APIs Understanding of backend architecture patterns (layered architecture, modular design, separation of concerns) Solid understanding of asynchronous programming, the event loop, and performance considerations in Node.js Experien

jobs.title: Software Engineer, React & Angular (Broker Web Platform) 1W Full Time Bitpanda Spain
jobs.description: Post a Job Home Jobs Companies Pricing Post a Job Software Engineer, React & Angular (Broker Web Platform) at Bitpanda Full Time Apply Now Who we are We simplify wealth creation. Founded in 2014 in Vienna, Austria by Eric Demuth, Paul Klanschek and Christian Trummer, we’re here to help people trust themselves enough to build their financial freedom — for now and the future. Our user-friendly, trade-everything platform empowers both first-time investors and seasoned experts to invest in the cryptocurrencies, crypto indices, stocks*, precious metals and commodities* they want — with any sized budget, 24/7. Our global team works across different cultures and time zones, bringing our products to more than 6 million customers, making us one of Europe’s safest and most secure platforms that powers modern investing. Headquartered in Austria but operating across Europe, our products are built by fast-moving, talented, “roll-up-your-sleeves-and-make-it-happen” kind of people. It’s these diverse perspectives and innovative minds operating as ONE TEAM that keep Bitpanda at the cutting edge of our industry. So if you’re someone who thinks big, moves fast and wants to make an impact right from day one, then get ready to join our industry-changing team. Let’s go! Your Mission You’ll help shape the experience of one of Europe’s fastest-growing investing and trading platforms, Bitpanda B2C . You’ll build fast, reliable, and delightful web interfaces that make investing, trading, and managing crypto feel simple and intuitive for millions of users. What you’ll do Build and maintain web applications using NextJS, React, and TypeScript, turning product ideas into polished user experiences. Collaborate closely with product, design, and backend teams to deliver features end-to-end, ensuring smooth interactions and performance. Own key parts of the frontend codebase, including reusable components, state management, and flows that impact millions of users. Ensure your code is secure, relia

jobs.title: Pessoa Desenvolvedora Fullstack ( React + Kotlin) 1W Full Time Zup
jobs.description: Post a Job Home Jobs Companies Pricing Post a Job Pessoa Desenvolvedora Fullstack ( React + Kotlin) at Zup Full Time Apply Now Nosso propósito é criar tecnologias que desafiam as melhores do mundo e mudam o jogo para nossos clientes. Por isso, buscamos profissionais que desejam fazer parte de uma cultura pautada pela excelência e inovação. Se você se identifica com um ambiente de trabalho colaborativo e movido por curiosidade, venha construir o futuro da tecnologia conosco. O que você fará por aqui Desenvolver e manter aplicações web escaláveis e performáticas utilizando React e Next.js. Construir APIs robustas e seguras utilizando Kotlin com frameworks como Ktor ou Spring Boot. Garantir a qualidade do código por meio de testes automatizados (unitários, integração e end-to-end). Trabalhar em colaboração com times multidisciplinares para entregar soluções alinhadas às necessidades do negócio. Participar de revisões de código, planejamento de sprints e outras práticas ágeis. Implementar práticas de CI/CD para automação de build, testes e deploy. Contribuir para a melhoria contínua dos processos e da arquitetura das aplicações O que esperamos que você saiba Front-end Sólida experiência com React.js, incluindo hooks, context API e gerenciamento de estado (Redux, Zustand ou similares). Experiência com Next.js, incluindo SSR, SSG, rotas dinâmicas e API routes. Forte conhecimento em TypeScript. Experiência com estilização moderna (CSS-in-JS, Styled Components ou Tailwind CSS). Conhecimento em ferramentas de build/bundlers como Webpack ou Vite. Experiência com testes front-end (Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress). Consumo de APIs RESTful e GraphQL. Back-end Proficiência em Kotlin para desenvolvimento back-end. Experiência com frameworks Kotlin para web, preferencialmente Ktor ou Spring Boot. Desenvolvimento e manutenção de APIs RESTful e/ou GraphQL. Conhecimento em bancos de dados relacionais (PostgreSQL, MySQL) e/ou NoSQL (MongoDB). Experiência com ORM (Exposed, Hibernat

jobs.title: Full Stack Software Engineer (TypeScript/JS) 1W Full Time DataCamp, Inc. Portugal
jobs.description: Post a Job Home Jobs Companies Pricing Post a Job Full Stack Software Engineer (TypeScript/JS) at DataCamp, Inc. Full Time Apply Now About DataCamp DataCamp's mission is to empower everyone with the data and AI skills essential for 21st-century success. By providing practical, engaging learning experiences, DataCamp equips learners and organizations of all sizes to harness the power of data and AI. As a trusted partner to over 17 million learners and 6,000+ companies , including 80% of the Fortune 1000, DataCamp is leading the charge in addressing the critical data and AI skills shortage. About the role We are looking for a Full-Stack Software Engineer to join one of our dynamic product teams at DataCamp. In this role, you will contribute to building and improving different parts of our B2B platform, including our web application, integrations with external systems, single sign-on (SSO), and reporting features. You’ll work closely with experienced engineers to develop and maintain full-stack solutions using modern frontend and backend technologies. With guidance and mentorship, you’ll help deliver user-centric features, learn how to design scalable systems, and grow your confidence tackling technical challenges across a broad product surface. The team’s work is highly varied and hands-on: one day you might be contributing to data pipelines that power reporting, the next you could be debugging a client SSO integration, and another you may be improving the UX of how courses are assigned to learners. This versatility gives you exposure to many parts of the product and helps you build a well-rounded engineering skill set. As part of the B2B Engineering team , you’ll be exposed to a variety of domains and technologies in a collaborative, fast-paced environment, while making a meaningful impact on how organizations use DataCamp to upskill their teams. Are you excited to work on real-world systems and help shape the future of online learning? We’d love to hear from you. Ab

jobs.title: Z UI/UX Designer at ZILO
skills: 3+ years of experience in UX/UI design, ideally within fintech, SaaS, or complex product environments.
Proven experience managing or contributing to a design system, including component libraries and documentation.
Strong portfolio demonstrating user-centred design and problem solving.
Proficiency in design and prototyping in Figma, with experience working in shared design libraries.
Experience conducting user research, usability testing, and data-informed design decisions.
Strong understanding of interaction design, visual design, and accessibility standards.
Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams including Product and Engineering.
Excellent communication and presentation skills.
Attention to detail with a passion for improving product usability and experience.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced, collaborative environment with evolving product needs.
jobs.description: Join the Future of Technology with ZILO™ At ZILO™, we're redefining what’s possible in technology. ZILO™ is the UK-based FinTech specialising in global asset and wealth management software, designed to scale and transform businesses of all types using our own developed AI Technology. Our mission is to digitalise the future of the global asset management industry. We are a team of experts with decades of combined experience at leading firms globally, who thrive in fast-paced environments and want to shape the future of technology. Every individual plays a key role in driving progress and making a real impact. We continuously strive to innovate and improve. Why work with us? At ZILO™, you'll be part of a dynamic and inclusive environment where creativity thrives. We offer the opportunity to work on cutting-edge technology, collaborate with talented individuals, and contribute to projects that have a real-world impact. We value continuous learning, personal growth, and providing our team with the resources they need to succeed. Ready to shape the future? Let’s talk. About the role As a UI/UX Designer at ZILO, you will help shape intuitive, high-quality product experiences for our platform. You will play a key role in evolving and maintaining the ZILO design system, ensuring consistency, accessibility, and scalability across our products. Working closely with Product Owners and the rest of the Design Team you will translate user needs and product goals into clear, thoughtful design solutions that improve usability and drive product value. There is an expectation you will attend our Churchill Place, Canary Wharf office, up to 3 days each week. Key Responsibilities Contribute to the evolution and governance of the ZILO design system, managing reusable components that are scalable, accessible, and aligned with our brand. Design intuitive user experiences that simplify complex workflows for our users. Collaborate with Product Managers and Engineers to ensure design solution

jobs.title: Netomi is hiring Product Designer
skills: Work closely with developers to address design implementation challenges.
Identify design problems and devise elegant solutions with a user-centered design approach.
Rapidly test and iterate your designs.
Collaborate with other team members and stakeholders.
Take smart risks and champion new ideas that lead to intuitive user experiences.
Act as a UX mentor and guide to our current and future UX designers.

Ability to collaborate and communicate effectively with product managers and engineers.
Strong command of the English language, both written and oral. with the ability to write copy as required.
Planning and integrating concepts into a broad range of visual planning/
Presentational/ business tools – Miro, Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, etc.
Experience with UX project planning tools such as Jira, Trello, and Monday.

jobs.description: About the Company: Netomi is the leading agentic AI platform for enterprise customer experience. We work with the largest global brands like Delta Airlines, MetLife, MGM, United, and others to enable agentic automation at scale across the entire customer journey. Our no-code platform delivers the fastest time to market, lowest total cost of ownership, and simple, scalable management of AI agents for any CX use case. Backed by WndrCo, Y Combinator, and Index Ventures, we help enterprises drive efficiency, lower costs, and deliver higher quality customer experiences. Want to be part of the AI revolution and transform how the world’s largest global brands do business? Join us! About the Role: You will be responsible for shaping the design direction for cutting edge AI centric features, creating and conducting user research, interviews and surveys, and translating them into sitemaps, wireframes and prototypes that will be used by our Engineering team to build a world class product. You will make an impact on the overall design and functionality of the Netomi platform and iterate upon it to ensure a great user experience. You will work closely with Product, Engineering and Customer Success teams to help build a leading-edge experience for our customers. Responsibilities Lead design initiatives by researching, conceiving, wire-framing, sketching, prototyping, and mocking up user experiences for our platform. Make strategic design and user-experience decisions related to existing and new functions and features based on hands-on user research, or by designing options for an A/B test. Work closely with product managers to understand requirements and develop high level and detailed storyboards, mockups and prototypes, to effectively communicate interaction, design, product and user goals. Translate concepts into wireframes and high quality design deliverables  to be used by the engineering team to build products. Work closely with developers to address design implementation c

jobs.title: S UX Designer at Sangoma

jobs.description: Join Sangoma, a leader in business communications, as a UX Designer focused on desk phone device-based experiences. We are looking for an experienced professional to join our Products development team and play a critical role in shaping the user experience of Sangoma’s desk phones and telephony devices, focused on embedded, hardware-contained device experiences, used daily by businesses worldwide. While this is a remote position, we are looking for someone in either eastern or central time zones. Sangoma is dedicated to empowering organizations through reliable Unified Communications, UCaaS, CCaaS, VoIP, and Hybrid solutions. In this role, you will focus on how our desk phone products work, not just how they look—designing clear, efficient, and predictable iteraction models for task-critical communication workflows. Requirements Your Role: You will be responsible for defining and evolving the interaction models, task flows, and usability foundations of Sangoma’s phone firmware and device interfaces. Provide UX design for desk phones (embedded, hardware-constrained products) with physical keys, small and/or touch screen displays. Define task flows and interaction patterns for telephony features such as calling, transfers, conferencing, voicemail, etc. Create UX and UI artifacts including user flows, wireframes, and interaction specifications, icons, and graphics. Produce clear interaction specifications and design documentation to support long development and maintenance cycles. Collaborate closely with firmware engineers to ensure UX designs are accurately implemented. Partner with Product Management to align UX decisions with real-world user needs and business priorities. jobs.description: Help bring AI agents to companies worldwide. Over the next decade, autonomous agents will redefine how we work. Botpress allows companies to build and deploy advanced AI agents that move beyond conversation into real business logic. Our product works today and at scale, across industries, regions, and limitless use cases. As the 3rd fastest-growing B2B AI start-up worldwide , we’re at the forefront of the AI revolution, providing the most widely-used platform for sophisticated AI agents. The work ahead is ambitious. The opportunity is rare. We take a deliberate approach to growth: product-led, capital-efficient, and highly focused. If you want to build foundational technology for one of the most meaningful platform shifts in software, we’re looking for top talent to join us. Key Highlights: Over 1 million AI agents and chatbots deployed 700,000+ platform users Trusted by 35% of Fortune 500 companies 7 years of expertise in AI solutions About the Role Botpress is hiring a Head of UX to take end-to-end ownership of the product design experience. This role requires someone able to navigate ambiguity when defining problems, explore solutions, prototype, and communicate design decisions and tradeoffs while working closely with Engineering and Product. The Head of UX will be responsible for delivering exceptional quality from early concepts through high-fidelity outputs, while helping shape interaction patterns for AI-driven products. The role also involves building scalable systems across design systems, operating rhythms, and research and insight loops. This person should be highly autonomous and able to identify product problems by observing user replays and how users interact with the product, synthesizing those insights with Product. The role also includes refining flows and product paper cuts, shaping AI-native workflows, and helping set the design culture bar. Responsibilities Design and ship product experiences from early concepts through high-fidelity outputs. Pa

jobs.description: Company Description CapTech is an award-winning consulting firm that collaborates with clients to achieve what’s possible through the power of technology. At CapTech, we’re passionate about the work we do and the results we achieve for our clients. From the outset, our founders shared a collective passion to create a consultancy centered on strong relationships that would stand the test of time. Today we work alongside clients that include Fortune 100 companies, mid-sized enterprises, and government agencies, a list that spans across the country. Job Description CapTech’s Customer Experience (CX) team seeks an Associate UX Director / Lead Product Designer with a track record of designing sophisticated digital brand experiences that are intuitive, impactful, and accessible. As a UX leader, you help influence user behavior and enhance brand-to-customer relationships by guiding the delivery of elegant and engaging digital products and services. You will partner with project managers, user researchers, UX and UI designers, content strategists, and developers to bring end-to-end digital experiences to life. Although most of your work will be hands-on and client-delivery focused, you may also lead engagement teams and mentor junior talent. Your management and leadership skills will help nurture client relationship and account growth, as well as inspire future design leaders and expand our practice. This could be the position for you if: You have a proven understanding of product strategy, heuristic analysis, information architecture, user research, user interface design, wireframing, prototyping, and usability testing. You are a strategic thinker who can translate business goals and user needs into thoughtful design solutions. You bring exceptional creative insight and drive, delivering projects from research through implementation in partnership with multi-discipline teams and the client. You seek the best ideas, regardless of source, and deliver persuasive client presen

jobs.title: UI Designer - Anime ARPG Saguni Studio 2000$ - 3300$ Full-Time Details
jobs.description: To help us process your application efficiently, please start your email subject line with [UID]. We are looking for a UI/UX Designer to join our team on a stylized anime action RPG / gacha title for PC and mobile, including controller support. Our game is story-driven with a strong combat focus, a third-person camera, and a structure built around a main lobby hub where players manage their inventory, team, and individual characters before entering level-based missions of roughly 15 minutes each. Our visual and product direction is inspired by titles such as Digimon, Wuthering Waves, Arknights: Endfield, Zenless Zone Zero and Solo Leveling: Arise. We are looking for someone who can take strong ownership over the full UI process, from early UX thinking and wireframes to polished mockups, motion concepts, and high-quality final interface assets. Responsibilities • Own the UI/UX design process across the game in close collaboration with design, programming, and art direction. • Translate gameplay requirements, feature briefs, references, and visual goals into sketches, wireframes, user flows, mockups, and final UI designs. • Help shape the UX of a cross-platform experience for PC, mobile, and console. • Create UI that is not only visually appealing, but also highly readable, intuitive, and satisfying to use. • Translate wireframes into polished interface concepts with strong motion design thinking, helping avoid static or lifeless UI presentation. • Prepare clear handoff material and documentation so engineers can implement the UI efficiently. • Contribute to a growing UI guideline / style guide document and support process documentation in parallel with production. • Collaborate where needed with monetization-related design to create strong reward presentation and other high-impact interface moments. Must-haves • Professional experience as a UI Designer, UI/UX Designer, or similar role in the games industry. • Strong understanding of readability, information hierarchy

jobs.title: Unreal Animation Programmer - Anime ARPG Saguni Studio Full-Time Details
jobs.description: To help us process your application efficiently, please start your email subject line with [PTA] We’re looking for an experienced Unreal Engine Animation Programmer (C++ ) to join our anime Action-RPG (PC + Mobile). Your focus will be animation polish and building traversal mechanics (climb, wallrun, grapple) on top of a custom ALS-based locomotion stack. The work must be multiplayer-ready and built for production quality. We use root motion, Motion Warping, and Distance Matching. We do not use Gameplay Ability System (GAS). Requirements come primarily from our Design team. Responsibilities Own animation gameplay programming for character locomotion, traversal, and overall movement feel Implement and polish traversal mechanics such as: Climb / ledge interactions Wallrun Grapple hook traversal Gliding Extend and maintain our custom ALS version (locomotion stack), ensuring clean integrations and long-term maintainability Work with root motion pipelines, Motion Warping, and Distance Matching to achieve high-quality, responsive movement and combat transitions Ensure traversal and locomotion systems are multiplayer-ready (replication, prediction where required, network smoothing and consistency) Partner closely with Design and Animation to translate requirements into robust systems and fast iteration loops Build debugging and visualization tools when needed (animation state debugging, root motion / warp diagnostics, network troubleshooting) Optimize animation-related runtime cost for PC and mobile targets (tick cost, anim graph complexity, update rates, LOD strategies) Must-have Strong Unreal Engine 5 experience in C++ with a focus on animation/gameplay integration Proven experience shipping or building networked character movement systems (replication and typical pitfalls) Hands-on experience with: ALS (Advanced Locomotion System) or comparable custom locomotion frameworks Root motion workflows in Unreal Solid understanding of animation architecture in UE (AnimBlueprint

jobs.title: Technical Artist (Unity 3D - Claymation Focus) Edge of the World Studios Part-Time Remote, working around GMT + 3 Unity URP 3D Shader graph VFX Lighting technical art Details
jobs.description: Unity URP 3D Shader graph VFX Lighting technical art We’re hiring and looking to connect with: Technical Artist (Unity - Stylized / Claymation Focus) Edge of the World Studios is looking to connect with a Technical Artist to help shape the visual and technical foundation of Halima , a 2.5D narrative puzzle-platforming adventure currently in development. This role sits between art and engineering. You’ll work closely with our Lead Artist and Technical Lead to ensure that our visual direction translates effectively into Unity - whether that means building shader systems, refining lighting setups, developing artist-friendly tools, or troubleshooting performance and rendering challenges. The Project: Halima is a 2.5D narrative puzzle-platformer inspired by folklore, mythology, and surreal dreamscapes. Visually, the project draws from handcrafted, claymation-inspired aesthetics - tactile surfaces, soft lighting, subtle imperfections, and atmospheric depth. This role will be central to ensuring that our clay-inspired art direction translates cleanly, beautifully, and efficiently into Unity. The game draws inspiration from claymation and stop-motion film , aiming to achieve a handcrafted, tactile feel. We’re exploring how best to bring that sensibility into real-time rendering - and we’re looking for someone who can help us experiment, prototype, and refine that visual direction inside the engine. What you’ll be working on We’re looking to connect with Technical Artists who can: Develop and refine custom shaders that support a claymation-inspired surface language (subtle surface noise, animated texture variation, non-photorealistic shading). Further develop and troubleshoot base shaders to support features such as animated surface variation (e.g., randomized clay texture movement systems). Build simplified systems that allow artists to control materials, shader parameters, and visual variation without requiring engineering support. Design and implement lighting setups in U

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer (Web) Entity Full-Time Remote  (+/- 3 hours GMT) TypeScript Front-End Web Frameworks Details
jobs.description: TypeScript Front-End Web Frameworks About Entity Entity is on a mission to bring console-quality games to players everywhere - instantly, on any device. Just as software, music and film moved from download and own to click and stream, we believe gaming is shifting from Download and Install to Click and Play Now. Powered by the latest web technologies and built on the open web, Entity is creating a new home for next-gen instant games. For players, a destination to discover and enjoy incredible new titles (think Steam or YouTube for games). For developers, the tools, publishing power, and access to a truly global audience across every connected device. Founded by industry veterans and entrepreneurs, and backed by leading investors, we're assembling our core team. Joining Entity at this stage is a rare opportunity to help shape the future of gaming. About the role We're seeking a Web / Frontend Engineer with a strong design sensibility to help craft the core user experience of our web-based games platform. This role is primarily frontend-focused (~70%), centered on building beautiful, intuitive, and highly polished web interfaces. You'll be shaping how players browse, discover, launch, and engage with games - creating a rich, immersive Games Hub that feels fast, modern, and delightful to use. The remaining ~30% of the role involves collaborating on architecture, performance, and real-time features to ensure those interfaces scale smoothly and feel instant, even under heavy load. We're especially excited about candidates who care deeply about UX/UI details, interaction quality, layout, motion, and visual coherence - and who enjoy working closely with designers to turn strong concepts into pixel-perfect reality. Key Responsibilities Frontend & UX (Primary Focus) Design and build high-quality, visually polished user interfaces for a web-based games platform. jobs.title: Cinematic Animation Artist Saguni Studio Full-Time Details
jobs.description: To help us process your application efficiently, please start your email subject line with [CAA] We are building a stylized anime action RPG in Unreal Engine (PC + Mobile, crossplay). For a 15 minute Gamescom demo (target: August), we are producing a small set of high impact in game cinematics using Level Sequence / Sequencer. We are looking for a Remote Unreal Cinematic Artist (Freelance) who can set up shots in Unreal, build strong camera language, assemble sequences, and create clean gameplay handovers. Our animation workflow is DCC first (Maya or Blender). We do not rely on Unreal Control Rig being set up. You will work closely with our Cinematic Director, Lead Animator, Tech Artist, and VFX and Lighting. Your mission Turn storyboards and shot lists into playable, in engine cinematics that feel premium and are easy to iterate. Create expressive, readable camera work that supports action and emotion. Keep the pipeline clean: consistent shot structure, naming, versioning, and predictable handoffs. Responsibilities Build and maintain Level Sequences and shot structure (shots, sub sequences, takes, versioning). Set up and animate cameras: framing, lens choices, camera movement, shake, focus, and pacing. Assemble imported animation assets into sequencers, handle timing and retiming, and maintain continuity. Collaborate with the Cinematic Director on cut decisions, rhythm, and cinematic language. Work with the Lead Animator to ensure animation readability and camera alignment. Support gameplay integration: triggers, safe handover back to gameplay camera, state restore, and sequencing constraints. Coordinate with VFX and Lighting for shot polish and consistency. Troubleshoot common Sequencer issues: bindings, possessables vs spawnables, animation tracks, transforms, and evaluation.
